results.title: ‘They should fear us’: Spain’s Lamine Yamal fires warning to France ahead of FIFA World Cup semifinal
results.description: FIFA World Cup 2026: Spain star Lamine Yamal has issued a warning before their semifinal match in Dallas, declaring that his team has nothing to fear against France.

results.title: Ranking the 12 best running backs in the NFL for 2026
results.description: The Steelers have a tandem of talented running backs but do either of them make our ranking of the 12 best in the NFL?

results.title: The €850 wonder horse Hewick has been retired after remarkable career
results.description: Shark Hanlon's stable star finished a gallant third in the RBC Brewin Dolphin Hurdle before his trainer revealed that the curtain had come down on one of racing's most remarkable stories

results.title: OCM names lean and mean contingent for Commonwealth Games
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Malaysia will be sending its smallest contingent to the Commonwealth Games in decades to the Glasgow Games on July 23-Aug 2.

results.title: ESPN picks Detroit Lions' 2026 breakout candidate
results.description: ESPN picked the Detroit Lions' 2026 breakout candidate.

results.title: Only One Can Survive! Football Braces For Explosive Kane vs Haaland Showdown In FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Final
results.description: England face Norway in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final at Miami's Hard Rock Stadium on Saturday. Thomas Tuchel's side reached the last eight after beating Mexico 3-2, while Stale Solbakken's Norway shocked Brazil 2-1. Harry Kane and Erling Haaland headline the clash, with the winners advancing to face Argentina or Switzerland.

results.title: Big Ten announces Iowa's 2025-26 Outstanding Sportsmanship Award Winners
results.description: Mark Gronowski and Taylor McCabe have been selected as Iowa’s 2026 Big Ten Outstanding Sportsmanship Award winners.
